## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `cco ...`
2. ...
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages or logs if available.

## Environment

- **OS**: macOS / Linux (distro)
- **Docker version**: (`docker --version`)
- **Claude Code version**: (`claude --version`)
- **cco version**: (git tag or commit hash)

## Additional Context

Any other relevant information (project.yml excerpt, screenshots, etc.).
